steps.title: Use the corrected assumption
steps.content: The team challenged an accepted view by showing that as many as half of the hunters were female. The blank must describe the old belief that this finding overturned.

steps.title: Choose a low-participation word
steps.content: The old view must have treated female participation as very small or insignificant. A suggests certainty, B suggests adequacy, and D would make the discovery unsurprising because it means widespread. The answer is C.
